title: agrostis botelhoi
intro: Agrostis botelhoi, also known as Botelho's bent or Agrostis, is a type of grass species. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis botelhoi include its potential to alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as digestive issues and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Agrostis botelhoi are typically made by infusing the dried plant material in hot water to create teas or infusions.
